channel.title: LoomLance Blog
channel.description: Feature releases, product updates, and press from the LoomLance team.

item.title: “Can you just add one more thing?”
item.description: Every freelancer knows the "can you just add one more thing" message. Change requests let you name the extra work, have your client approve it on a link, and turn it into an invoice.

item.title: GitHub integration is here
item.description: Connect your GitHub repos to LoomLance projects, pull issues into your kanban, and let smart-commits link the work you ship to the work you bill.

item.title: The Developer-First Freelance Platform: Why LoomLance Is Built Differently
item.description: KrispiTech takes a look at LoomLance and why the admin side of your work shouldn't be harder than the code.
